revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Abbey | Guid=3035-8306 | Deck=The monastery where the monks live. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Pope,Concepts/Priest | Objects=Objects/Altar,Objects/Church_Organ,Objects/Stained_Glass | Locations=Locations/Cathedral,Locations/Chapel,Locations/Church,Locations/Shrine,Locations/Temple | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3637686-11047198-murder-in-the-abbey-windows-walking-through-the-abbey.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Alpha Halo | Guid=3035-7942 | Deck=Installation 04, also known as Alpha Halo, or simply Halo, was one of seven ring-shaped superweapons that comprised the Forerunners' Halo Array, And it is located close to the gas giant, Threshold and the closest ring to human occupied space. Installation 04's monitor is 343 Guilty Spark. | Characters=Characters/343_Guilty_Spark,Characters/Chips_Dubbo,Characters/Cortana,Characters/Jacob_Keyes,Characters/Marcus_Stacker,Characters/Master_Chief,Characters/Sergeant_Major_Avery_Junior_Johnson,Characters/ZukaZamamee | Concepts=Concepts/Alien,Concepts/Alien_Invasion,Concepts/Ancient_Advanced_Civilization_Technology,Concepts/Collective_Conciousness,Concepts/Covenant_Elite,Concepts/Covenant_Grunt,Concepts/Cults,Concepts/Extinction,Concepts/Flood_Carrier_Form,Concepts/Flood_Combat_Form,Concepts/Flood_Infection_Form,Concepts/Forerunner_Flood_War,Concepts/Human_Covenant_War,Concepts/Hunters,Concepts/Jackals,Concepts/Low_Poly,Concepts/Monster_Infighting,Concepts/ODST,Concepts/Plot_Twist,Concepts/Religion,Concepts/Sentinel,Concepts/Snow,Concepts/Space_Triptych,Concepts/Super_Weapon,Concepts/The_Covenant,Concepts/The_Flood,Concepts/The_Forerunners,Concepts/The_Great_Journey,Concepts/Tripartite_Conflict,Concepts/War | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Beach,Locations/Delta_Halo,Locations/Desert,Locations/Gamma_Halo,Locations/Halo,Locations/Island,Locations/Swamp,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/Tundra,Locations/Zeta_Halo | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3439627-9141874153-HCE-A.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3439627-9141874153-HCE-A.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Installation 04, also known as Alpha Halo, or simply Halo, was one of seven ring-shaped superweapons that comprised the Forerunners' Halo Array, And it is located close to the gas giant, Threshold and the closest ring to human occupied space. Installation 04's monitor is 343 Guilty Spark.

Located in Dimension X, it is where a Triceraton Fillet is fought. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}

revision.comment: Restore content truncated by the legacy migration (3035-8016, guid-audit)
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Bada Bing! | Guid=3035-8016 | Deck=The Bada Bing! is a mob-owned strip club and central location in The Sopranos. | Characters=Characters/Christopher_Moltisanti,Characters/Joey_LaRocca,Characters/Paulie_Walnuts,Characters/Salvatore_Bonpensiero,Characters/Silvio_Dante,Characters/Tony_Soprano,Characters/Vito_Spatafore | Concepts=Concepts/Dancing,Concepts/Hub_World,Concepts/Nudity,Concepts/Strippers | Objects=Objects/Pool_Table,Objects/Stripper_Pole | Locations=Locations/New_Jersey,Locations/Strip_Club,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/105/1056167/3461341-badabing.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3461341-badabing.jpg","path":"105\/1056167\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
The Bada Bing! is a fictional strip club and mob hangout for the DiMeo crime family in the crime drama series ''The Sopranos''. Operated by both [[Characters/Silvio_Dante|Silvio Dante]] and [[Characters/Tony_Soprano|Tony Soprano]], it is one of two notable hangouts in the series.
In real life, the strip club is named Satin Dolls and located in Lodi, New Jersey.
==Inspirations== The Bada Bing! is likely named after a quote from ''The''''Godfather''.
The club is loosely based on Wiggles, a real life strip joint which was onced a hangout for the DeCavalcante family in New Jersey.

{{Location | Name=Badminton | Guid=3035-8066 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Baghdad | Guid=3035-8133 | Deck=Capital of Iraq and the second largest city in the Arab world. | Characters=Characters/Basim_Ibn_Ishaq | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Iraq,Locations/Middle_East,Locations/Palace | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/105/1056167/3531492-baghdad.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3531492-baghdad.jpg","path":"105\/1056167\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,scale_medium,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Capital of Iraq and the second largest city in the Arab world.

{{Location | Name=Beecher's Hope | Guid=3035-8328 | Deck=The residence of John Marston and his family in the Red Dead series. | Characters=Characters/Abigail_Marston,Characters/Charles_Smith,Characters/Jack_Marston,Characters/John_Marston,Characters/Rufus_56473,Characters/Sadie_Adler,Characters/Uncle | Concepts=Concepts/Chicken,Concepts/Cows,Concepts/Horses,Concepts/Player_Owned_Houses | Objects=Objects/Bathtub,Objects/Bed,Objects/Campfire,Objects/Fireplace,Objects/Gazebo,Objects/Piano | Locations=Locations/Barn,Locations/Great_Plains,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/West_Elizabeth }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Beecher's Hope is a ranch in Great Plains, West Elizabeth. It was constructed in 1907 by [[Characters/John_Marston|John Marston]], [[Characters/Charles_Smith|Charles Smith]] and [[Characters/Uncle|Uncle]].
==List of Residents== * John Marston * Abigail Marston * Jack Marston * Uncle * Rufus * Charles Smith (temporarily, 1907) * Sadie Adler (temporarily, 1907)

{{Location | Name=Berkeley | Guid=3035-8200 | Deck=A city in California, a suburb of Oakland, and the home of the University of California Berkeley. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/California_Golden_Bears | Objects= | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Oakland,Locations/Taco_Bell_Cantina,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3603043-vc_spotlightberkeley_hero_stock_rf_149303390_1280x640.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Bermuda | Guid=3035-8005 | Deck=Bermuda is a British Overseas Territory in the North Atlantic Ocean. Its capital city is Hamilton. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/McDonalds }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Bermuda is a British Overseas Territory in the North Atlantic Ocean. Its capital city is Hamilton.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Big Ben | Guid=3035-8186 | Deck=Clock tower, which stands at the north end of the Palace of Westminster in London, England. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/The_19th_Century | Objects= | Locations=Locations/England,Locations/London | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3597418-%D0%91%D1%83%D1%84%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%BC%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B005.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3597418-\u0411\u0443\u0444\u0435\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043c\u0435\u043d\u043005.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,scale_tiny,scale_super,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":"Soccer Kid"},"background":[]}' /> Clock tower, which stands at the north end of the Palace of Westminster in London, England.
